title: From pain to purpose: The journey of Johannes.C.Wolfaardt
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Johannes C. Wolfaardt's unflinching memoir, Struggling Stains, published in 2024 by NS Skrywershuis, lays bare a childhood destroyed by domestic violence, years of institutional neglect and an adulthood consumed by addiction and despair.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Johannes C. Wolfaardt's unflinching memoir, Struggling Stains, published in 2024 by NS Skrywershuis, lays bare a childhood destroyed by domestic violence, years of institutional neglect and an adulthood consumed by addiction and despair."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Struggling Stains has already been adapted for the stage, with the theatrical production scheduled to premiere at the Vrystaat Arts Festival in 2026."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The book chronicles how, even before Wolfaardt was born, his mother suffered severe abuse at the hands of his father.","html":"The book chronicles how, even before Wolfaardt was born, his mother suffered severe abuse at the hands of his father."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When he was two years old, she fled the home, leaving Wolfaardt and his brother behind with a father who redirected his rage toward the boys.","html":"When he was two years old, she fled the home, leaving Wolfaardt and his brother behind with a father who redirected his rage toward the boys."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"What followed were years of physical and emotional brutality, followed by further hardship in foster homes and orphanages.","html":"What followed were years of physical and emotional brutality, followed by further hardship in foster homes and orphanages."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As an adult, Wolfaardt descended into substance abuse, homelessness and multiple suicide attempts.","html":"As an adult, Wolfaardt descended into substance abuse, homelessness and multiple suicide attempts."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A near-fatal incident in 2021 proved to be the turning point. With support from people who had previously helped him, he chose to face his trauma head-on and begin the long process of rebuilding his life.","html":"A near-fatal incident in 2021 proved to be the turning point. With support from people who had previously helped him, he chose to face his trauma head-on and begin the long process of rebuilding his life."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The book has already been adapted for the stage, with a premiere planned for the Vrystaat Arts Festival in 2026.","html":"The book has already been adapted for the stage, with a premiere planned for the Vrystaat Arts Festival in 2026."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, Johannes C. Wolfaardt can be reached at  [email protected]","html":"For more information, Johannes C. Wolfaardt can be reached at [email protected]"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
